title: Minimalista - LabPBR
description: A super cute-looking resource pack which is fully LabPBR complaint!
body:
Website: https://www.shivamzter.com
Gumroad: https://store.shivamzter.com
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Shivamzter ## What is Minimalista? A fully LabPBR compliant super cute resource pack. ## What are the core features? Minimalista is a fully LabPBR compliant resource pack, Minimalista is also made by keeping both Iris and Optifine compatibility in mind and the aim is full texture pack completion. **How do I install?** There's a full installation [guide](https://www.shivamzter.com/installation) available to help you with the installation, If you still have any further questions or issues, please join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/p4xfRMEPXs) server and ask on the ***#support*** channel where either someone from the community or I will be happy to help you out! > It is Recommended to use a **LabPBR compliant shader** to get the most out of Minimalista, We recommend **Nostalgia/NostalgiaVX** Shaders by **Rre36**. **You are not allowed to make commercial use of this texture pack, Redistribute or Claim it as your own in any way. You are allowed to make videos with the texture pack as long as you link the website [https://www.shivamzter.com/](https://www.shivamzter.com/) in the videos' description.**
